creator: dinoex@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: feedback->closed

Thanks for reporting back. 

mail
----
Sorry, forgot to cvs update...

Now it's perfect:

% dot -Tblabla
Renderer type: "blabla" not recognized. Use one of: canon cmap cmapx dia
dot fig gd gd2 gif hpgl imap ismap jpeg jpg mif mp pcl pic plain
plain-ext png ps ps2 svg svgz swf vrml vtx wbmp xdot

I apologize for trouble... It is great that problems get fixed before
one can even think about it :)
----
